strings.Message_FileNotFound: The save file {0} could not be found.
strings.Message_RemoveCharacterAssociation: Are you sure you want to remove this Character association?\nThe save file will NOT be deleted.
strings.Message_IncorrectGameVersion_SR4: This save file is intended to be used with Shadowrun 4th Edition while this version of Chummer is for Shadowrun 5th Edition. Please use the Shadowrun 4th Edition version of Chummer to open this file.
strings.Message_IncorrectGameVersion_SR5: This save file is intended to be used with Shadowrun 5th Edition while this version of Chummer is for Shadowrun 4th Edition. Please use the Shadowrun 5th Edition version of Chummer to open this file.
strings.Message_Main_RunningWild: You must have Running Wild selected as a sourcebook in order to create Critters.
strings.Message_UnsavedChanges: There are unsaved changes to {0}. Would you like to save your character before closing this window?
strings.Message_CyberzombieRequirements: This character does not meet the following requirements for becoming a Cyberzombie:
strings.Message_CyberzombieRequirementsEssence: Must have an Essence lower than 0.
strings.Message_CyberzombieRequirementsStimulato: Must have an Invoked Memory Stimulator
strings.Message_CyberzombieConfirm: Are you sure you want to convert this character to a Cyberzombie?
strings.String_CyberzombieWILDescription: Roll the number of dice show and enter the number of Hits in the space provided. This will determine the value of Negative Qualities you must pick for becoming a Cyberzombie.
strings.Message_EnemyLimit: You cannot gain more than {0} from Enemies.
strings.Message_NegativeQualityLimit: You cannot gain more than {0} from Negative Qualities.

strings.Message_DeleteVehicleLocation: Are you sure you want to delete this Vehicle location? All of the Gear in this location will be moved to the Vehicle itself.

strings.Message_DeleteMetamagic: Are you sure you want to delete this Metamagic?
strings.Message_DeleteEcho: Are you sure you want to delete this Echo?

strings.Message_DeleteKnowledgeSkill: Are you sure you want to delete this Knowledge Skill?
strings.Message_DeletePositiveQualityCareer: Are you sure you want to delete this Positive Quality? You will not receiving any Karma for removing it.
strings.Message_DeleteImprovement: Are you sure you want to delete this Improvement?
strings.Message_DeleteImprovementGroup: Are you sure you want to delete this Improvement Group? All of the Improvements in this group will be moved to the Selected Improvements container.

strings.Message_SpiritServices: A Spirit cannot owe more services than your current Summoning Skill Rating.
strings.Message_SpriteServices: A Sprite cannot owe more tasks than your current Compiling Skill Rating.
strings.Message_PowerLevel: Your Power Level cannot exceed your MAG score.
strings.Message_MartialArtAdvantageLimit: You may only have 1 Advantage per Rating of {0}.
strings.Message_MartialArtManeuverLimit: You may only have 2 Maneuvers per Martial Art Rating.
strings.Message_SelectMartialArtAdvantage: You must select a Martial Art to add an Advantage to.
strings.Message_PositiveQualityLimit: You cannot spend more than {0} on Positive Qualities.
strings.Message_MetavariantQuality: You cannot remove Qualities that come from your Metatype/Metavariant.
strings.Message_MetavariantQualitySwap: You cannot swap Qualities that come from your Metatype/Metavariant.
strings.Message_SpellLimit: You cannot have more spells than twice your Spellcasting or Ritual Spellcasting Skill Ratings.
strings.Message_BoundSpiritLimit: Your number of bound Spirits cannot exceed your CHA score.
strings.Message_RegisteredSpriteLimit: Your number of registered Sprites cannot exceed your CHA score.
strings.Message_CannotRemoveCyberware: This item cannot be removed because it is included as a base feature for a piece of Cyberware.
strings.Message_ComplexFormLimit: Your number of Complex Forms cannot exceed twice your LOG score.
strings.Message_CannotRemoveQualityWeapon: You cannot remove a Quality Weapon from here. You must remove the Quality from the Common tab instead.
strings.Message_CannotRemoveCyberweapon: You cannot remove a Cyberweapon from here. You must remove the Cyberweapon from the Cyberware tab instead.
strings.Message_CannotRemoveGearWeapon: You cannot remove a Weapon created by Gear from here. You must remove the Gear from the Gear tab instead.
strings.Message_CannotRemoveGearWeaponVehicle: You cannot remove a Weapon created by Gear from here. You must remove the Gear from the Vehicle instead.
strings.Message_CannotRemoveVehicleMod: You cannot remove a Modification that comes with a Vehicle.
strings.Message_CannotSelectMetamagic: Your Initiate Grade must be higher than 0 to select Metamagics.
strings.Message_CannotSelectEcho: Your Submersion Grade must be higher than 0 to select Echoes.
strings.Message_AdditionalMetamagic: An additional Metamagic will cost {0} Karma. Are you sure you want to add a new Metamagic?
strings.Message_AdditionalMetamagicLimit: You may only have a number of Metamagics equal to your MAG + Initiate Grade.
strings.Message_AdditionalEcho: An additional Echo will cost you {0} Karma. Are you sure you want to add a new Echo?
strings.Message_AdditionalEchoLimit: You may only have a number of Echoes equal to your RES + Submersion Grade.
strings.Message_CannotIncreaseInitiateGrade: Your Initiate Grade cannot exceed your MAG Attribute.
strings.Message_CannotIncreaseSubmersionGrade: Your Submersion Grade cannot exceed your RES Attribute.

strings.Message_SelectWeaponMod: You must first select a Weapon to add a Modification to.

strings.Message_CannotModifyWeaponMod: Modifications cannot be added to this Weapon.
strings.Message_WeaponGear: Gear cannot be added to this Weapon Accessory.
strings.Message_CyberweaponNoAccessory: Accessories cannot be added to Cyberweapons.
strings.Message_CyberwareGear: Gear cannot be added to this piece of Cyberware.

strings.Message_SelectVehicleName: You must first select a Vehicle to name.

strings.Message_VehicleWeaponAccessories: Weapon Accessories can only be added to Vehicle Weapons.
strings.Message_VehicleWeaponMods: Weapon Modifications can only be added to Vehicle Weapons.
strings.Message_VehicleWeaponUnderbarrel: Underbarrel Weapons can only be added to Vehicle Weapons.
strings.Message_SelectGearVehicle: You must first select a Vehicle to add Gear to.
strings.Message_ModifyVehicleGear: You must first select a piece of Gear to modify.

strings.Message_CannotAddComplexFormOption: This Complex Form does not allow Options.
strings.Message_ConntAddComplexFormOptionLimit: This Complex Form cannot have more than {0} Options because of its Rating.
strings.Message_FocusMaximumForce: The total Force of all bonded Foci may not exceed five times your MAG score.
strings.Message_FocusMaximumNumber: Characters may only bond a number of Foci equal to their MAG score.
strings.Message_UnbindFocus: Are you sure you want to un-bind this Focus?
strings.Message_AttributeMaximum: You cannot have more than one Attribute at its maximum value during character creation.
strings.Message_AttributeBuildPoints: You cannot spend more than {0} on Attributes.
strings.Message_CapacityReached: This item has reached its Capacity limit.
strings.Message_InvalidBeginning: This character is not valid and breaks the following rules:
strings.Message_InvalidNoTradition: No Magic Tradition has been selected
strings.Message_InvalidNoStream: No Technomancer Stream has been selected
strings.Message_InvalidAvail: {0} more items with Avail higher than {1} than allowed
strings.Message_ExtraKarma: You have {0} remaining but are only allowed to carry {1} over to your career.\nAre you sure you want to lose these extra points?
strings.Message_ConfirmCreate: Once a character has been saved as Created it cannot be modified further using the Build system. The character is put into Career mode where they can be improved with Karma and are ready for play.\n\nAre you sure you want to save your character as Created?
strings.Message_CannotChangeMetatype: You cannot change your Metatype until the following Metatype-dependant Qualities have been removed.
strings.Message_CyberwareGradeMismatch: All of a character's Cyberware must be of the same Grade to create a Cyberware Suite.
strings.Message_NoCyberware: This character does not have any Cyberware.

strings.Message_BurnEdge: Are you sure you want to Burn this point of Edge?
strings.Message_CannotSpendEdge: You do not have any Edge left to spend.
strings.Message_CannotRegainEdge: You cannot exceed your Edge Attribute.
strings.Message_NotEnoughKarma: You do not have enough Karma for this expense.
strings.Message_ConfirmKarmaExpense: Are you sure you want to spend Karma on improving {0} to {1} for {2} Karma?
strings.Message_ConfirmKarmaExpenseSpecializatio: Are you sure you want to spend Karma on changing your Specialization to {0} for {1} Karma?
strings.Message_ConfirmKarmaExpenseEnemy: Do you need to spend {0} Karma to remove this Enemy?
strings.Message_ConfirmKarmaExpenseSpend: Are you sure you want to spend {1} Karma on {0}?
strings.Message_ConfirmKarmaExpenseRemove: Are you sure you want to spend {1} Karma on removing {0}?
strings.Message_ConfirmKarmaExpenseComplexFormOp: Are you sure you want to add this Complex Form Option for {0} Karma?
strings.Message_ConfirmKarmaExpenseFocus: Are you sure you want to spend {0} Karma on binding {1}?

strings.Message_ConfirmKarmaExpenseLeaveGroup: Are you sure you want to spend {0} Karma on leaving a Group?

strings.Message_ConfirmKarmaExpenseLeaveNetwork: Are you sure you want to spend {0} Karma on leaving a Network?
strings.Message_ConfirmKarmaExpenseQuickeningMet: Are you sure you want to spend {0} Karma on Quickening {1}?
strings.Message_NotEnoughNuyen: You do not have enough Nuyen for this expense.
strings.Message_BreakSkillGroup: This Active Skill currently belongs to the {0} Skill Group. Improving this Active Skill will break this Skill Group and cannot be undone.\nAre you sure you want to continue?
strings.Message_AddNegativeQuality: Are you sure you want to add this Negative Quality? You will not receive any Karma for adding it.
strings.Message_QualitySwap: Are you sure you want to swap {0} for {1}?
strings.Message_OutOfAmmoType: You do not have any {0} Ammunition remaining!
strings.Message_NotEnoughAmmoSingleShot: Only one bullet remaining. Treat as Single Shot?
strings.Message_NotEnoughAmmoShortBurstShort: Not enough Ammunition. Treat as shortened Short Burst?
strings.Message_NotEnoughAmmoShortBurst: Not enough Ammunition. Treat as Short Burst?
strings.Message_NotEnoughAmmoLongBurstShort: Not enough Ammunition. Treat as shortened Long Burst?
strings.Message_NotEnoughAmmoFullBurst: Not enough Ammunition. Cannot fire Full Burst.
strings.Message_NotEnoughAmmoSuppressiveFire: Not enough Ammunition. Cannot fire Suppressive Fire.
strings.Message_UndoNoHistory: No undo history for this item.
strings.Message_UndoExpense: Are you sure you want to undo this Expense Entry?
strings.Message_ReduceQty: Are you sure you want to reduce this quantity by 1?
strings.Message_VehicleCyberwarePlugin: This Vehicle Mod does not allow Cyberware Plugins.
strings.Message_CloningMachineNumberRequired: You must enter the number of clones to create.
strings.Message_CannotSplitGear: You cannot split a single item.
strings.Message_CannotMergeGear: No exact matches for this item were found.
strings.Message_SelectLifestyleName: You must first select a Lifestyle to name.
strings.Message_CannotMoveWeapons: You do not have any Vehicles with Weapon Mounts or Mechanical Arms.
strings.Message_CannotStackFoci: You must have at least 2 un-Bonded Foci to create a Stacked Focus.
strings.Message_StackedFocusMinimum: A Stacked Focus must contain at least 2 Foci.
strings.Message_StackedFocusForce: A Stacked Focus cannot have a combined Force higher than 6.
strings.Message_ConfirmReapplyImprovements: Chummer will attempt to re-locate your characters Improvable items and re-apply any Improvements they grant. This may result in your character's Attributes, Skills, and other numbers changing if any of the Improvements these items grant have changed. It is recommended that you save your character before performing this action in case you are not satisfied with the changes. Are you sure you want to re-apply Improvements?
strings.Message_VesselInCareerMode: The Vessel must be in Career Mode in order to be Possessed or Inhabited.
strings.Message_PossessionSave: The Spirit must first be saved before it can Possess or Inhabit a Vessel. Save changes now?
strings.String_WeaponName: Enter a new name for this Weapon (or blank to remove).
strings.String_VehicleName: Enter a new name for this Vehicle (or blank to remove).
strings.String_ArmorName: Enter a new name for this Armor (or blank to remove).
strings.String_LifestyleName: Enter a new name for this Lifestyle (or blank to remove).
strings.String_GearName: Enter a new name for this Gear (or blank to remove).
strings.String_CyberzombieReduceAttribute: Select an Attribute to reduce (both Value and Metatype Maximum).
strings.String_CloningMachineNumber: How many clones would you like to create?
strings.String_QuickeningKarma: How much Karma do you want to spend to Quicken {0}?
strings.String_Retrofit: Retrofitting a Vehicle will cost a percentage of the Vehicle's base cost. Please select a percentage.
strings.String_SplitGear: Enter the number of items to place in the new stack.
strings.String_MergeGear: Enter the number of items to move to the stack.
strings.String_MoveGear: Enter the number of items to move.
strings.String_SelectWeaponCategoryAmmo: Select a Weapon Category for this Ammunition.
strings.Tip_CommonAttributes:
Characters cannot spend more than 50% of their BP on Primary Attributes (not including EDG, MAG, and RES).
Only one attribute may be at its Maximum value during character creation.
strings.Tip_CommonNuyen: The amount of Nuyen your character has to purchase equipment. 1 BP = {0}¥.
strings.Tip_CommonAIRating: An A.I.'s Rating is the average of their CHA, INT, LOG, and WIL Attributes.
strings.Tip_CommonAISystem: An A.I.'s System is the average of their INT and LOG Attributes.
strings.Tip_CommonAIFirewall: An A.I.'s Firewall is the average of their CHA and WIL Attributes.
strings.Tip_CommonAIResponse: Response of the Node the A.I. currently resides on.
strings.Tip_CommonAISignal: Signal of the Node the A.I. currently resides on.
strings.Tip_CommonContacts: Each point of Connection or Loyalty costs {0} BP.
strings.Tip_CommonEnemies: Enemies are the opposite of Contacts. Each Enemy counts towards your Negative Qualities BP amount.
strings.Tip_StreetCred: Street Cred is calculated as Career Karma ÷ 10, rounded up, and can be further adjusted by Game Masters.
strings.Tip_Notoriety: Notoriety is typically gained through Qualities and can be further adjusted by Game Masters. Notoriety can be reduced by 1 point by burning 2 points of Street Cred.
strings.Tip_PublicAwareness: Public Awareness is calculated as (Street Cred + Notoriety) ÷ 3, rounded down, and can be further adjusted by Game Masters.
strings.Tip_BurnStreetCred: Burn 2 points of Street Cred to reduce Notoriety by 1.
strings.Tip_SkillsSkillGroups: Skill Groups cost {0} BP per point.
strings.Tip_SkillsActiveSkills: Skills cost {0} BP per point and {1} BP for a Specialization. Characters may have up to 1 Active Skill at Rating 6 or two at Rating 5. The rest must be at Rating 4 or lower.
strings.Tip_SkillsKnowledgeSkills: Characters receive (INT + LOG) x 3 free points to spend on general Knowledge Skills including Languages. Additional Knowledge Skill points cost {0} BP each. A Language with a Rating of 0 is considered to be your Native Language.
strings.Tip_SpellsSpirits: Each Service a Spirit owes costs {0} BP.
strings.Tip_TechnomancerComplexForms: Complex Forms cost {0} BP per Rating.
strings.Tip_TechnomancerSprites: Each Task a Sprite owes costs {0} BP.
strings.Tip_TechnomancerResponse: Living Persona Response is equal to INT.
strings.Tip_TechnomancerSignal: Living Persona Signal is equal to RES / 2.
strings.Tip_TechnomancerSystem: Living Persona System is equal to LOG.
strings.Tip_TechnomancerFirewall: Living Persona Firewall is equal to WIL.
strings.Tip_TechnomancerBiofeedbackFilter: Living Persona Biofeedback Filter is equal to CHA.
strings.Tab_IncreaseLifestyleMonths: Increase the number of pre-paid months for the Lifestyle.
strings.Tab_DecreaseLifestyleMonths: Decrease the number of pre-paid months for the Lifestyle.
strings.Tip_ArmorEquipped: Equipped Armor and Armor Mods are factored into Armor Encumbrance and a character's highest Armor Ratings.
strings.Tip_BuyAmmo: Buy additional Ammo for this Weapon
strings.Tip_WeaponInstalled: Installed Weapon Accessories and Mods count towards a Weapon's stats.
strings.Tip_DecreaseGearQty: Reduce the quantity of the Gear by 1.
strings.Tip_ActiveCommlink: Mark the selected Commlink as being the one that the character is currently using. This will adjust the character's Matrix Initiative appropriately.
strings.String_AddLocation: Enter a name for this new location.
strings.Tip_CharacterCreated: Once a character has been saved as Created it cannot be further modified using the Build system. The character is put into Career mode where it can be improved with Karma and used for play.
strings.Message_BurnStreetCred: Are you sure you want to burn 2 points of Street Cred to reduce Notoriety by 1?
strings.Tip_BuildSpecialAttributes: Special Attributes are EDG, MAG, and RES.
strings.Tip_BuildPositiveQualities: Characters may select up to 35 BP worth of Positive Qualities. Qualities in dark red do not count towards the 35 BP limit.
strings.Tip_BuildNegativeQualities: Characters may select up to -35 BP worth of Negative Qualities. Qualities in dark red do not count towards the -35 BP limit.
strings.Tip_BuildFoci: Each bonded Focus costs {0} BP per point of Force.
strings.Tip_BuildManeuvers: Each Martial Art Maneuver costs {0} BP.
strings.Tip_OtherInitiative: Initiative is calculated as REA + INT.
strings.Tip_OtherInitiativePasses: Characters have 1 Initiative Pass unless increased through magic or gear.
strings.Tip_OtherMatrixInitiative: Matrix Initiative is calculated as Commlink Response + INT.
strings.Tip_OtherMatrixInitiativePasses: Characters have 1 Matrix Initiative Pass unless increased through a Cold or Hot Sim.
strings.Tip_OtherAstralInitiative: Astral Initiative is calculated as INT x 2.
strings.Tip_OtherBallisticArmor: Only the highest single Ballistic value is used to determine your Armor Rating. If the total Ballistic value for all pieces worn exceeds BOD x 2, you receive a -1 penalty to AGI for every 2 points you are over.
strings.Tip_OtherImpactArmor: Only the highest single Impact value is used to determine your Armor Rating. If the total Impact value for all pieces worn exceeds BOD x 2, you receive a -1 penalty to AGI for every 2 points you are over.
strings.Tip_OtherEssence: Characters start with 6 Essence which is decreased by adding Cyberware and Bioware.
strings.Tip_OtherNuyen: The amount of Nuyen you have left to purchase gear.
strings.Tip_OtherComposure: Composure is calculated as WIL + CHA.
strings.Tip_OtherJudgeIntentions: Judge Intentions is calculated as INT + CHA.
strings.Tip_OtherLiftAndCarry: Lift and Carry is calculated as STR + BOD.
strings.Tip_OtherMemory: Memory is calculated as LOG + WIL.
strings.Tip_OtherCareerKarma: The amount of Karma the character has accumulated over their career.
strings.Tip_CMCMPenalty: Dice pool penalty from Condition Monitor damage.
strings.Tip_CMDamageResistance: Number of dice used to make Damage Resistance Tests.
strings.Tip_ImproveInitiateGrade: Improve Initiate Grade to {0} for {1} Karma
strings.Tip_ImproveSubmersionGrade: Improve Submersion Grade to {0} for {1} Karma
strings.Tip_Contact_OpenLinkedContact: Open the linked Contact save file.
strings.Tip_Contact_LinkContact: Link this Contact to a Chummer save file.
strings.Tip_Enemy_OpenLinkedEnemy: Open the linked Enemy save file.
strings.Tip_Enemy_LinkEnemy: Link this Enemy to a Chummer save file.
strings.Tip_Contact_OpenFile: Open the linked Contact save file.
strings.Tip_Enemy_OpenFile: Open the linked Enemy save file.
strings.Tip_Contact_LinkFile: Link this Contact to a Chummer save file.
strings.Tip_Enemy_LinkFile: Link this Enemy to a Chummer save file.
strings.Tip_Power_DoublePoints: The Power Point cost for this Power has been increased because it has caused the Attribute to exceed your Metatype Maximum value by {0}. This cost increase only applies to the {0} points that have exceeded the Metatype Maximum.
strings.Tip_Spirit_LinkSpirit: Link this Spirit to a Chummer save file.
strings.Tip_Sprite_LinkSprite: Link this Sprite to a Chummer save file.
strings.Tip_Spirit_OpenFile: Open the linked Spirit save file.
strings.Tip_Sprite_OpenFile: Open the linked Sprite save file.
strings.Message_SelectCritterType: You must select a Critter before you can create a character for them.
strings.Message_UnknownCritterType: A Critter called {0} could not be found in the Critters data files.
strings.Message_CyberwareSuite_SuiteName: Please enter a name for your Suite.
strings.Message_CyberwareSuite_FileName: Please enter a file name to save the Suite to.
strings.Message_CyberwareSuite_InvalidFileName: File names must start with "custom" and end with "_{0}.xml"
strings.Message_CyberwareSuite_DuplicateName: A Suite named "{0}" already exists in the "{1}" data file. Please choose a different name.
strings.Message_CreatePACKSKit_KitName: Please enter a name for your Kit.
strings.Message_CreatePACKSKit_FileName: Please enter a file name to save the Kit to.
strings.Message_CreatePACKSKit_InvalidFileName: File names must start with "custom" and end with "_packs.xml"
strings.Message_CreatePACKSKit_DuplicateName: A Kit named "{0}" already exists in the "{1}" data file. Please choose a different name.
strings.Checkbox_Expense_Refund: Refund (does not count towards Total Career Karma)
strings.Checkbox_Expense_RefundNuyen: Refund (does not count towards Total Career Nuyen)
strings.Message_History_FileNotFound: The revision history file could not be found.
strings.Label_LifestyleNuyen_Description: Roll the number of dice shown below and enter the result to determine your character's starting Nuyen amount.
strings.Message_Metatype_SelectMetatype: You must select a Metatype before continuing.
strings.Tip_Metatype_PossessionTradition: Spirits summoned by practitioners of a Possession-based Tradition receive the Possession Critter Power instead of Materialization.
strings.Tip_Metatype_BloodSpirit: Blood Spirit variants are summoned with the Invoking Blood Spirits Metamagic and gain additional Critter Powers.
strings.Message_Omae_CannotConnection: Could not connect to Omae. Please make sure that your computer is connected to the Matrix. If the problem persists, the Omae site may be inaccessible at the moment.
strings.Message_Omae_FileExists: A file called "{0}" already exists in your Omae save directory.\nDo you want to overwrite this file by downloading the selected file?
strings.Message_Omae_CannotFindCharacter: Could not locate the uploaded information for this character.
strings.Message_Omae_CharacterDownloaded: Character downloaded. Would you like to open it now?
strings.Message_Omae_ConfirmDelete: Deleting this character will remove all of the character's information from Omae. Are you sure you want to delete this character?
strings.Message_Omae_CharacterDeleteError: There was an error deleting this character. Please try again later.
strings.Message_Omae_CannotFindData: Could not locate the uploaded information for this data file.
strings.Message_Omae_ConfirmData: Deleting this data will remove all of its information from Omae. Are you sure you want to delete this data?
strings.Message_Omae_DataDeleteError: There was an error deleting this data. Please try again later.
strings.Message_Omae_DataDownloaded: Data file downloaded. You will need to restart Chummer if you downloaded an override files in order for their changes to take effect.
strings.Message_Omae_CannotFindSheet: Could not locate the uploaded information for this character sheet.
strings.Message_Omae_ConfirmSheet: Deleting this character sheet will remove all of its information from Omae. Are you sure you want to delete this character sheet?
strings.Message_Omae_SheetDeleteError: There was an error deleting this character sheet. Please try again later.
strings.Message_Omae_AccountCreated: Your Omae account has been created!
strings.Message_Omae_AccountExists: An account with that username already exists.
strings.Message_Omae_CannotLogin: Could not log into Omae. Please make sure your username and password are correct.
strings.Message_Omae_MustLogin: You must be logged into Omae in order to upload a character. Please login with your account, or register your account to upload your character.
strings.Message_Omae_PasswordNoEmail: Your password could not be reset because you do not have an email address attached to your account.
strings.Message_Omae_PasswordReset: Your password has been reset. An email has been sent with your new password.
strings.Message_Omae_InfoRequiresLogin: You must be logged into Omae to retrieve your account information.
strings.Message_OmaeUpload_CannotUploadFile: Only Chummer character files may be uploaded.
strings.Message_OmaeUpload_CannotUploadSheet: Only XSL and XSLT files may be uploaded.
strings.Message_OmaeUpload_UnnamedCharacter: You cannot upload an unnamed character.
strings.Message_OmaeUpload_SelectFile: You must select a file to upload.
strings.Message_OmaeUpload_CharacterDescription: Please provide a short description of the character so other users have some idea about this character.
strings.Message_OmaeUpload_FileTooLarge: This character file is too large to submit to Omae. If this file has a mugshot, you may need to crop or remove the mugshot before attempting to submit this again.
strings.Message_OmaeUpload_UploadComplete: File uploaded. Thanks for your submission!
strings.Message_OmaeUpload_DataName: You must enter a name for this data file.
strings.Message_OameUpload_DataDescription: Please provide a short description of what this data file contains.
strings.Message_OmaeUpload_DataSelectFiles: You must include at least 1 file in your data file upload.
strings.Message_OmaeUpload_SheetName: You must enter a name for this character sheet.
strings.Message_OameUpload_SheetDescription: Please provide a short description of what this character sheet contains.
strings.Message_OmaeUpload_SheetSelectFiles: You must include at least 1 file in your character sheet upload.
strings.Checkbox_Options_LocalisedUpdatesOnly: Only download updates in my selected language
strings.Checkbox_Options_ConfirmDelete: Ask for confirmation when deleting items
strings.Checkbox_Options_ConfirmKarmaExpense: Ask for confirmation for Karma expenses
strings.Checkbox_Options_PrintAllSkills: Print all Active Skills with total score higher than 0
strings.Checkbox_Options_SingleArmorEncumbrance: No Armor Encumbrance when wearing only one piece of Armor (AR 44)
strings.Checkbox_Options_LimitSkills: Limit Skills to 20 dice or 2 x (Natural Attribute + Skill Rating), whichever is higher (SR4 61)
strings.Checkbox_Options_SkillRegroup: Allow Skills to be re-Grouped if all Ratings are the same (SR4 FAQ)
strings.Checkbox_Options_MetatypesCostKarma: Metatypes cost Karma equal to their BP
strings.Checkbox_Options_FreeKnowledgeSkills: Karma Build: Free Knowledge Skills like BP Build
strings.Checkbox_Options_MaxSpiritForce: Max. Spirit Force and Mystic Adept Power Levels based on total MAG Attribute
strings.Checkbox_Options_EssenceLossReducesMaxim: Essence loss only reduces MAG/RES maximum
strings.Checkbox_Options_AllowCyberwareESSDiscou: Allow Cyberware Essence costs to be discounted
strings.Checkbox_Options_AllowCustomTransgenics: Allow any Bioware to be converted to Transgenic (AU 93)
strings.Checkbox_Options_BreakSkillGroupsInCreat: Allow Skill Groups to be broken during character creation (SR4 68)
strings.Checkbox_Options_ExtendAnyDetectionSpell: Allow any Detection Spell to be taken as Extended range version (SM 165)
strings.Checkbox_Options_ErgonomicProgramLimit: Ergonomic Programs do not affect a Commlink's effective Response (UN 114)
strings.Checkbox_Options_SpecialKarmaCost: Karma cost for increasing Special Attributes is reduced with Essence Loss
strings.Checkbox_Options_AutomaticCopyProtection: Automatically add Copy Protection plugin to Matrix Programs (requires Unwired)
strings.Checkbox_Options_AutomaticRegistration: Automatically add Registration plugin to Matrix Programs (requires Unwired)
strings.Checkbox_Options_ExceedPositiveQualities: Allow characters to exceed 35 BP worth of Positive Qualities
strings.Checkbox_Options_ExceedNegativeQualities: Allow characters to exceed 35 BP worth of Negative Qualities
Characters only receive up to 35 BP from Negative Qualities
strings.Checkbox_Options_SingleDiceRoller: Use a single instance of the Dice Roller window
strings.Checkbox_Options_MultiplyRestrictedCost: Multiply the cost of Restricted items by
strings.Checkbox_Options_MultiplyForbiddenCost: Multiply the cost of Forbidden items by
strings.Checkbox_Option_CalculateCommlinkRespons: Calculate Commlink Response based on number of running programs
strings.Checkbox_Option_AllowSkillDiceRolling: Allow dice rolling for dice pools
strings.Checkbox_Option_CreateBackupOnCareer: Create backup of character before moving them to Career Mode
strings.Checkbox_Option_AllowExceedAttributeBP: Allow characters to exceed 50% of points in Attributes
strings.Checkbox_Option_UnrestrictedNuyen: Characters can spend any number of points on Nuyen
strings.Checkbox_Option_AllowHigherStackedFoci: Allow the combined Force of Stacked Foci to exceed 6
strings.Checkbox_Option_AllowEditPartOfBaseWeapo: Allow Weapon Accessories and Mods to change their Part of Base Weapon status
strings.Checkbox_Option_AlternateMetatypeAttribu: Treat Metatype Attribute Minimum as 1 for the purpose of determining Karma costs
strings.Checkbox_Option_PrintArcanaAlternates: Print Arcana variation Skills (from Street Magic)
strings.Checkbox_Option_AllowObsolescentUpgrade: Allow Obsolescent to be removed/upgraded in the same way as Obsolete
strings.Label_Options_EssenceDecimals: Number of decimal places to round Essence to:
strings.Checkbox_Option_FreeSpiritPowerPointsMAG: Free Spirits receive Power Points based on MAG instead of EDG
strings.Checkbox_Option_SpecialAttributeKarmaLim: Special Attributes do not count towards 50% Karma limit during character creation
strings.Checkbox_Option_TechnomancerAllowAutosof: Technomancers may select Autosofts as Complex Forms
strings.Message_Options_RestoreDefaults: This will reset the totals on this tab back to their default value. Are you sure you want to do this?
strings.Message_SelectAdvancedLifestyle_Lifestyl: Please give your new Lifestyle a name.
strings.String_SelectBP_BPSummary: Enter the amount of Build Points you are allowed to create your character with (Default {0}).
strings.String_SelectBP_KarmaSummary: Enter the amount of Karma you are allowed to create your character with (Default {0}).
strings.Tip_SelectBP_IgnoreRules: When checked, all BP and Attribute/Skill maximum rules will be ignored. Intended for Game Master/NPC use only.
strings.String_SelectContactConnection_MagicalMi: A minority have limited magical assets
strings.Label_SelectExoticSkill_Description: Select an Exotic Active Skill to add to your character.
strings.String_SelectItemFocus: Select a Focus to add to the Stacked Focus. Click Cancel if you are done adding Foci to the Stacked Focus.
strings.Message_SelectMetamagic_MetamagicRequire: You do not meet the requirements for this Metamagic. You must meet all of the following criteria:
strings.Message_SelectMetamagic_EchoRequirement: You do not meet the requirements for this Echo. You must meet all of the following criteria:
strings.Checkbox_SelectMetamagic_LimitList: Show only Metamagics I can take
strings.Checkbox_SelectEcho_LimitList: Show only Echoes I can take
strings.Message_DeletePACKSKit: Are you sure you want to delete the custom PACKS Kit {0}?
strings.Message_SelectPower_PowerRequirement: You do not meet the requirements for this Power. You must meet all of the following criteria:
strings.Checkbox_SelectQuality_LimitList: Show only Qualities I can take
strings.Message_SelectQuality_QualityLimit: This Quality cannot be taken more than once.
strings.Message_SelectQuality_QualityRestriction: You cannot select this Quality because of the following Forbidden items you have already taken.
strings.Message_SelectQuality_QualityRequirement: You do not meet the requirements for this Quality. You must meet at least one of the following criteria:
strings.Label_SelectSetting_SettingsDescription: Select a Settings file to use. Settings determine the default build method, number of build points, maximum Availability, and optional and house rules that will be used when building your character.
strings.Label_SelectSide: Select a side to install {0} on.
strings.Tip_SelectSpell_LimitedSpell: Limited Spells require a Fetish to cast but add +2 dice to the Drain Resistance Test after casting this Spell.
strings.Tip_SelectSpell_ExtendedSpell: Extended range Spells have a range of (Force x MAG x 10) meters but have their DV increased by +2.
strings.Label_CalendarStart: Enter the year, month, and week number to start the calendar at.
strings.Message_Update_CannotConnect: Unable to retrieve update information. Please try again later.
strings.Message_Update_NoNewUpdates: No new updates are available at this time.
strings.Message_Update_MultipleInstances: Chummer cannot be updated while there is more than 1 instance of the application running. Please close the other instances of Chummer then run the update again.
strings.Message_SelectItem: You must select an item by clicking the Select Value button.
strings.Message_ImprovementName: Please enter a name for this Improvement.
strings.Message_SpellName: You must enter a name for your new Spell.
strings.Message_SpellRestricted: You must specify how your Spell is restricted.
strings.Message_CombatSpellRequirement1: You must select either Direct or Indirect from the Spell Options.
strings.Message_CombatSpellRequirement2: You must select either Physical damage or Stun damage from the Spell Options.
strings.Message_DetectionSpellRequirement1: You must select at least 1 of Directional, Area, or Psychic from the Spell Options.
strings.Message_DetectionSpellRequirement2: You must select either Active or Passive from the Spell Options.
strings.Message_IllusionSpellRequirement1: You must select either Obvious or Realistic from the Spell Options.
strings.Message_IllusionSpellRequirement2: You must select either Single-Sense or Multi-Sense from the Spell Options.
strings.Message_ManipulationSpellRequirement1: You must select either Environmental, Mental, or Physical from the Spell Options.
strings.Message_ManipulationSpellRequirement2: You must select either Minor Change or Major Change from the Spell Options.
strings.String_Improvement_SelectSkillNamed: Choose an Active Skill for {0} to affect.
strings.String_Improvement_SelectSkill: Choose an Active Skill to affect.
strings.String_Improvement_SelectSkillGroupName: Choose a Skill Group for {0} to affect.
strings.String_Improvement_SelectSkillGroup: Choose a Skill Group to affect.
strings.String_Improvement_SelectAttributeNamed: Choose an Attribute for {0} to affect.
strings.Message_CharacterOptions_CannotLoadSetti: The character's settings file ({0}) could not be found. Use default settings instead?
strings.Message_CharacterOptions_CannotLoadChara: Cannot load a character without a settings file.
